site_name: Hiring Journey
site_description:
AI powered career growth platform helping users with job preparation, resume optimization, interview preparation and salary insights.

primary_topics:
- career development
- interview preparation
- resume optimization
- AI career tools
- salary insights
- job preparation guides

content_types:
- blog articles
- career roadmaps
- AI powered tools
- salary insights
- interview questions
- resume examples

preferred_crawl_sections:
- /
- /blog
- /career
- /salary
- /tools

avoid_crawl_sections:
- /dashboard
- /api
- /user-data
- /private
